title: At the Vet
scene: 你带狗狗去宠物医院体检。

turns.cn: 它最近食欲怎么样？
turns.en: How's his appetite been lately?

turns.cn: 正常，但昨天吐了一次。
turns.en: Normal, but he vomited once yesterday.

turns.cn: 有没有吃不该吃的东西？
turns.en: Has he eaten anything he shouldn't?

turns.cn: 可能咬了沙发上的填充物。
turns.en: He might have chewed stuffing from the couch.

turns.cn: 我检查一下，应该不严重。
turns.en: Let me examine him. It should be fine.

turns.cn: 需要打疫苗吗？
turns.en: Does he need any shots?

turns.cn: 狂犬疫苗明年到期，今天可以一起打。
turns.en: His rabies shot expires next year. We can do it today.

title: Pet Store
scene: 你在宠物店买狗粮和用品。

turns.cn: 找什么？狗还是猫？
turns.en: What are you looking for? Dog or cat?

turns.cn: 中型犬的成犬粮，无谷物配方。
turns.en: Adult food for a medium dog, grain-free.

turns.cn: 这款卖得好，三十磅装六十九块。
turns.en: This one sells well. Sixty-nine for a thirty-pound bag.

turns.cn: 有试吃小包装吗？
turns.en: Do you have a small trial size?

turns.cn: 有，五磅的十九块九。
turns.en: Yes, a five-pound bag for nineteen ninety-nine.

turns.cn: 先拿小的，再加一个磨牙棒。
turns.en: I'll try the small one, plus a chew toy.

turns.cn: 好的，需要帮忙搬上车吗？
turns.en: Sure. Need help carrying it to your car?

title: Dog Park
scene: 你在狗公园和其他狗主人聊天。

turns.cn: 你的狗好活泼！什么品种？
turns.en: Your dog is so energetic! What breed is he?

turns.cn: 金毛混种，叫Buddy，一岁半。
turns.en: Golden mix. His name is Buddy. He's a year and a half.

turns.cn: 他经常来这个公园吗？
turns.en: Does he come here often?

turns.cn: 每天下班后来，不然在家拆家。
turns.en: Every day after work, or he destroys the house.

turns.cn: 哈哈，这边下午人少一些。
turns.en: Ha! It's less crowded here in the afternoon.

turns.cn: 是啊，记得带水，喷泉夏天才开。
turns.en: Yeah. Bring water. The fountain only runs in summer.

turns.cn: 谢谢提醒！回见。
turns.en: Thanks for the tip. See you around!

title: Pet Grooming
scene: 你带猫去宠物店洗澡剪毛。

turns.cn: 今天做什么？洗澡还是全套？
turns.en: What are we doing today? Bath or full groom?

turns.cn: 全套，它打结很严重。
turns.en: Full groom. She's really matted.

turns.cn: 猫可能紧张，您能在旁边吗？
turns.en: She might get nervous. Can you stay nearby?

turns.cn: 可以，它怕吹风机。
turns.en: Sure. She's scared of the blow dryer.

turns.cn: 我们尽量温柔，大概一小时。
turns.en: We'll go gently. About an hour.

turns.cn: 好了给我打电话，我在隔壁咖啡店等。
turns.en: Call me when done. I'll wait at the coffee shop next door.

turns.cn: 没问题。
turns.en: No problem.

title: Lost Pet Poster
scene: 你的猫走丢了，问邻居有没有看到。

turns.cn: 你好，你见过这只橘猫吗？昨晚走丢了。
turns.en: Hi, have you seen this orange cat? She got out last night.

turns.cn: 好像在后巷见过，不确定。
turns.en: I think I saw one in the back alley, not sure.

turns.cn: 她叫Mimi，很亲人，会回应名字。
turns.en: Her name is Mimi. She's friendly and answers to her name.

turns.cn: 我帮你留意，有消息告诉你。
turns.en: I'll keep an eye out and let you know.

turns.cn: 谢谢，这是我的电话。
turns.en: Thank you. Here's my number.

turns.cn: 祝你好运，希望很快找到。
turns.en: Good luck. I hope you find her soon.

title: Pet Boarding
scene: 你出差前把狗送到宠物酒店寄养。

turns.cn: 欢迎！狗狗叫什么名字？
turns.en: Welcome! What's your dog's name?

turns.cn: 叫Max，三天后我来接。
turns.en: Max. I'll pick him up in three days.

turns.cn: 疫苗记录带来了吗？有特殊饮食吗？
turns.en: Vaccination records? Any special diet?

turns.cn: 记录在这，他对鸡肉过敏。
turns.en: Here are the records. He's allergic to chicken.

turns.cn: 我们每天遛两次，可以发照片给您。
turns.en: We walk twice daily and can send you photos.

turns.cn: 太好了，他怕打雷。
turns.en: Great. He's scared of thunder.

turns.cn: 我们会安排安静房间，放心。
turns.en: We'll put him in a quiet room. Don't worry.

title: Pet Grooming
scene: 你带狗去宠物美容院洗澡剪毛。

turns.cn: 今天全套洗澡剪指甲，四十五块。
turns.en: Full bath and nail trim today is forty-five.

turns.cn: 他怕吹风机，能温柔点吗？
turns.en: He's scared of the dryer. Could you go easy on him?

turns.cn: 会用低风速，第一次可旁观。
turns.en: We'll use low speed. You can watch if it's his first time.

turns.cn: 毛剪短一点，夏天凉快。
turns.en: Trim the coat shorter for summer.

turns.cn: 大概两小时，好了发短信。
turns.en: About two hours. We'll text when he's done.

turns.cn: 需要驱虫药吗？
turns.en: Do you sell flea treatment?

turns.cn: 前台有，接狗时一起拿。
turns.en: At the front desk. Grab it when you pick him up.

title: Emergency Vet
scene: 你的狗吃了巧克力，深夜去宠物急诊。

turns.cn: 什么时候吃的？大概多少？
turns.en: When did he eat it? Roughly how much?

turns.cn: 一小时前，半块黑巧克力。
turns.en: About an hour ago, half a bar of dark chocolate.

turns.cn: 体重多少？黑巧毒性更高。
turns.en: How much does he weigh? Dark chocolate is more toxic.

turns.cn: 三十磅，现在有点不安。
turns.en: Thirty pounds. He's restless now.

turns.cn: 建议催吐并输液观察，今晚住院。
turns.en: I recommend inducing vomiting and fluids overnight.

turns.cn: 费用大概多少？
turns.en: About how much will it cost?

turns.cn: 急诊八百到一千二，保险可报部分。
turns.en: Eight hundred to twelve hundred for ER care. Insurance may cover part.
